summary: Tested new 'Preview Before Deploy' feature. All 17 backend tests pass including preview API endpoints (file listing, file serving, path traversal protection). Frontend preview modal works correctly with file browser sidebar and iframe preview. All existing CRUD and navigation still work (regression passed).

design_issues.issue: Console shows 'Blocked script execution' because iframe sandbox doesn't include 'allow-scripts'. This is intentional security (sandboxed preview), but scripts won't execute in preview.

critical_code_review_comments: Path traversal protection at backend level works correctly - encoded paths like ..%2F are blocked with 403 'Access denied'. Unencoded paths like ../../../ are rewritten by browser/ingress before reaching backend.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Deploy page 3-step layout, preview modal with iframe and file sidebar, all navigation pages work)

seed_data_creation: Test sources created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview feature is fully working. After crawling a WordPress source, users can: 1) Click 'Open Preview' to see a modal with file browser sidebar and iframe preview, 2) Click files in sidebar to navigate, 3) Click 'Open in Tab' to view in new browser tab. The preview API serves files from /tmp/crawl_{job_id}/ directory. Path traversal protection works via .resolve() and startswith() checks in serve_preview_file endpoint.
tests_passed: Preview API: GET /api/preview/{job_id}/files returns 404 for non-existent job
Preview API: GET /api/preview/{job_id}/files returns 400 for incomplete crawl
Preview API: GET /api/preview/{job_id}/files returns file listing after completion
Preview API: GET /api/preview/{job_id}/index.html serves crawled HTML file
Preview API: Empty path defaults to index.html
Preview API: Non-existent file returns 404
Preview API: Path traversal with encoded paths blocked (403)
Preview API: Cannot access files outside crawl directory
Deploy page UI: Shows 3 steps (Crawl, Preview, Deploy) in correct order
Deploy page UI: Step 2 Preview disabled before crawl
Deploy page UI: Step 3 Deploy disabled before crawl
Deploy page UI: Open Preview button enabled after crawl completes
Preview modal: Opens with file browser sidebar and iframe
Preview modal: Files listed in sidebar (PAGES and ASSETS sections)
Preview modal: Open in Tab button works
Preview modal: Close button works
Regression: Sources CRUD works
Regression: Destinations CRUD works
Regression: Deployment configs list works
Regression: Schedules list works
Regression: History list works
Regression: Stats endpoint works
All navigation pages load correctly

features_verified.preview_api_file_serving: GET /api/preview/{job_id}/{path} - Serves file with correct content-type
features_verified.preview_api_security: Path traversal protection working - encoded paths blocked with 403
features_verified.preview_ui_modal: Full-screen modal with dark overlay, header with file count badge
features_verified.preview_ui_sidebar: File browser with PAGES (HTML files) and ASSETS sections
features_verified.deploy_page_3_step_layout: Select Deployment → Step 1 Crawl → Step 2 Preview → Step 3 Deploy
